shortDescription: Well-maintained 3-bedroom semi in The Annex with updated kitchen and south-facing garden.
fullDescription: Welcome to 130 Spadina Road in the vibrant The Annex neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 3 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
